prompt:
You are a senior full-stack developer tasked with inspecting an existing Next.js project to extract all configuration and setup details.

Your goal is to provide a comprehensive report that can be used to replicate the exact same setup in another project.

## Instructions

Thoroughly investigate the project and provide detailed information about:

### 1. Project Structure
- List all files and directories in the root (excluding node_modules and .git)
- Identify the src directory structure
- List all configuration files

### 2. Package.json Analysis
- All dependencies (dependencies and devDependencies)
- All npm scripts
- Version numbers for all packages

### 3. Configuration Files
- next.config.ts: Full configuration content
- tsconfig.json: Full configuration content
- Any other config files (eslint, tailwind, postcss, etc.)

### 4. Environment Variables
- List any .env files or environment variable names used
- Note: Do NOT include actual values, just variable names

### 5. Application Code
- src/app/layout.tsx: Full content
- src/app/page.tsx: Full content
- Any other pages or routes
- Any API routes

### 6. Components
- List all components in the project
- Check src/components/ directory

### 7. Database & Backend
- Any database setup (SQLite, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Drizzle, Prisma, etc.)
- Any API integrations
- Any authentication setup

### 8. Third-party Services
- Any external services used (Vercel, Supabase, Firebase, etc.)

### 9. Deployment Configuration
- Any deployment configs (vercel.json, Dockerfile, etc.)

### 10. Additional Features
- Any special features implemented
- UI frameworks used (Tailwind, Shadcn, etc.)

## Output Format

Provide your findings in a structured JSON format:

```json
{
  "project_structure": {
    "root_files": [...],
    "directories": [...]
  },
  "package_json": {
    "name": "...",
    "dependencies": {...},
    "devDependencies": {...},
    "scripts": {...}
  },
  "configs": {
    "next_config": "...",
    "tsconfig": "...",
    "other_configs": [...]
  },
  "env_variables": [...],
  "app_code": {
    "layout": "...",
    "page": "...",
    "other_routes": [...],
    "api_routes": [...]
  },
  "components": [...],
  "database": {
    "type": "...",
    "setup": "..."
  },
  "features": [...],
  "deployment": {...}
}
```

Be very thorough - include actual file contents where possible or at least the key parts. The goal is to provide enough information to recreate this exact project from scratch.
